title: Realistic Tree Capitator
description: Chop one log and the entire tree breaks automatically with realistic item drops.
body:
🌳 Realistic Tree Capitator

Tired of breaking trees one log at a time? This datapack makes tree cutting fast and satisfying.

Break the bottom log of a tree and the entire tree will collapse automatically. All logs drop together so you can collect them easily.

✨ Features
• Break one log to destroy the entire tree
• Logs drop together at the base
• Supports all vanilla trees
• Works in survival worlds
• Multiplayer compatible
• Lightweight and optimized

🌲 Supported Trees
Oak
Birch
Spruce
Jungle
Dark Oak
Acacia
Mangrove
Cherry

⚙️ Compatibility
Minecraft Java Edition 1.21 – 1.21.11

📦 Installation
Download the datapack and place it in your world's datapacks folder, then run /reload.

Enjoy faster and more satisfying tree chopping!
